originContent: A GitHub Action to instantly provision an ephemeral, cross-platform [Distributed Nix Build](https://wiki.nixos.org/wiki/Distributed_build) cluster using standard [GitHub Hosted Runners](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/runners/github-hosted-runners) securely connected via Tailscale.
translatedContent: Sebuah GitHub Action untuk langsung menyediakan cluster [Distributed Nix Build](https://wiki.nixos.org/wiki/Distributed_build) yang sementara dan lintas platform menggunakan [GitHub Hosted Runners](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/reference/runners/github-hosted-runners) standar yang terhubung secara aman melalui Tailscale.

originContent: This action allows you to spin up a matrix of secondary GitHub runners (the **Builders**) and connect them to a primary runner (the **Coordinator**) seamlessly over Tailscale SSH. The Coordinator automatically configures Nix to use these nodes as remote builders, maximizing concurrent build performance without managing external infrastructure! It is perfect for building multi-architecture packages or horizontally scaling heavy NixOS system closures across a fleet of x86 runners.
translatedContent: Aksi ini memungkinkan Anda untuk menjalankan matriks runner GitHub sekunder (disebut **Builder**) dan menghubungkannya ke runner utama (disebut **Coordinator**) dengan mulus melalui Tailscale SSH. Koordinator akan secara otomatis mengonfigurasi Nix untuk menggunakan node-node ini sebagai remote builder, memaksimalkan kinerja build secara bersamaan tanpa harus mengelola infrastruktur eksternal! Sangat cocok untuk membangun paket multi-arsitektur atau melakukan skala horizontal pada proses build NixOS yang berat di banyak runner x86.

originContent: - 🚀 **Zero-Config Remote Builders:** Automatically configures `/etc/nix/machines` and connects nodes via Tailscale SSH (no manual SSH keys required!).
translatedContent: - 🚀 **Zero-Config Remote Builders:** Secara otomatis mengonfigurasi `/etc/nix/machines` dan menghubungkan node melalui Tailscale SSH (tidak perlu kunci SSH manual!).

originContent: - 🌍 **Cross-Platform & Multi-Arch:** Mix and match Ubuntu (x86, ARM) and macOS (Intel, Apple Silicon) runners in the same build.
translatedContent: - 🌍 **Lintas Platform & Multi-Arsitektur:** Kombinasikan dan padukan runner Ubuntu (x86, ARM) dan macOS (Intel, Apple Silicon) dalam satu proses build.

originContent: - ⚖️ **Horizontal Scaling for NixOS:** Need to evaluate and build a massive NixOS configuration? Spin up an entire farm of identical nodes (e.g., five `ubuntu-24.04` runners) and let Nix automatically distribute parallel derivation builds across all available CPU cores in the cluster.
translatedContent: - ⚖️ **Skalabilitas Horizontal untuk NixOS:** Perlu mengevaluasi dan membangun konfigurasi NixOS besar? Jalankan satu kelompok node identik (misal, lima runner `ubuntu-24.04`) dan biarkan Nix secara otomatis mendistribusikan build derivasi paralel ke seluruh inti CPU yang tersedia di klaster.

originContent: - 🧹 **Maximum Disk Space:** Automatically cleans up pre-installed software on Linux runners (via [nothing-but-nix](https://github.com/wimpysworld/nothing-but-nix)) to give your Nix store maximum breathing room.
translatedContent: - 🧹 **Ruang Disk Maksimal:** Secara otomatis membersihkan perangkat lunak pra-instalasi pada runner Linux (melalui [nothing-but-nix](https://github.com/wimpysworld/nothing-but-nix)) agar ruang Nix store Anda maksimal.

originContent: - ⚡ **Built-in Caching:** Integrates [magic-nix-cache](https://github.com/DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action) to speed up flake evaluations and local builds.
translatedContent: - ⚡ **Caching Bawaan:** Mengintegrasikan [magic-nix-cache](https://github.com/DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action) untuk mempercepat evaluasi flake dan build lokal.

originContent: - 🛑 **Graceful Teardown:** Builders wait idly for tasks and self-terminate gracefully when the Coordinator finishes.
translatedContent: - 🛑 **Penghentian yang Halus:** Builder menunggu tugas dalam keadaan idle dan menghentikan dirinya sendiri secara halus ketika Koordinator selesai.

originContent: The workflow separates runners into two roles: `builder` and `coordinator`.
translatedContent: Alur kerja memisahkan runner menjadi dua peran: `builder` dan `coordinator`.

originContent:
Note over Coord: Tests Nix connection &
Updates /etc/nix/machines
translatedContent:
Note over Coord: Tests Nix connection &
Updates /etc/nix/machines

originContent: Coord->>B1: Send aarch64-linux build tasks via SSH
translatedContent: Coord->>B1: Send aarch64-linux build tasks via SSH

originContent: Coord->>B2: Send aarch64-darwin build tasks via SSH
translatedContent: Coord->>B2: Send aarch64-darwin build tasks via SSH

originContent: Before using this action, you need to configure a Tailscale network for the runners to communicate securely.
translatedContent: Sebelum menggunakan aksi ini, Anda perlu mengkonfigurasi jaringan Tailscale agar runner dapat berkomunikasi dengan aman.

originContent: Ensure your Tailscale has tag groups created and ACLs allow the coordinator to SSH into the builders seamlessly using Tailscale SSH.
translatedContent: Pastikan Tailscale Anda memiliki grup tag yang dibuat dan ACL memungkinkan koordinator untuk SSH ke builder dengan lancar menggunakan Tailscale SSH.

originContent: Add the following to your [Tailscale Access Controls](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/acls/file):
translatedContent: Tambahkan hal berikut ke [Kontrol Akses Tailscale](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/acls/file) Anda:

originContent: <summary>Click to view required Tailscale ACL configuration</summary>
translatedContent: <summary>Klik untuk melihat konfigurasi ACL Tailscale yang diperlukan</summary>

originContent: Generate an OAuth Client Secret in your [Tailscale Admin panel](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/trust-credentials), with `auth_keys` write scope and `nix-ci-builder` `nix-ci-coordinator` tags.
translatedContent: Buat OAuth Client Secret di [panel Admin Tailscale](https://login.tailscale.com/admin/settings/trust-credentials), dengan scope penulisan `auth_keys` dan tag `nix-ci-builder` `nix-ci-coordinator`.

originContent: Add this secret to your GitHub Repository Secrets as `TS_OAUTH_SECRET`.
translatedContent: Tambahkan secret ini ke GitHub Repository Secrets Anda sebagai `TS_OAUTH_SECRET`.

originContent: | `tailscale_authkey`  | Tailscale OAuth client secret or Auth Key.                                                      | **Yes**  | N/A         |
translatedContent: | `tailscale_authkey`  | Secret OAuth client Tailscale atau Auth Key.                                                   | **Ya**   | N/A         |

originContent: | `tailscale_hostname` | Hostname to register with Tailscale.                                                            | **Yes**  | N/A         |
translatedContent: | `tailscale_hostname` | Hostname untuk didaftarkan ke Tailscale.                                                       | **Ya**   | N/A         |

originContent: | `tailscale_tags`     | Tags to advertise to Tailscale (e.g. `tag:nix-ci-builder`).                                     | **Yes**  | N/A         |
translatedContent: | `tailscale_tags`     | Tag yang akan diiklankan ke Tailscale (misal `tag:nix-ci-builder`).                            | **Ya**   | N/A         |

originContent: | `role`               | Role of the current job: `"builder"` or `"coordinator"`.                                        | Yes      | `"builder"` |
translatedContent: | `role`               | Peran dari job saat ini: `"builder"` atau `"coordinator"`.                                     | Ya       | `"builder"` |

originContent: | `builders`           | Space separated list of full builder hostnames to wait for. (_Required if role is coordinator_) | No       | `""`        |
translatedContent: | `builders`           | Daftar hostname builder penuh yang dipisahkan spasi untuk ditunggu. (_Wajib jika role coordinator_) | Tidak    | `""`        |

originContent: | `builder_timeout`    | Maximum time (in seconds) the builder should wait before self-terminating.                      | No       | `"300"`     |
translatedContent: | `builder_timeout`    | Waktu maksimum (dalam detik) builder menunggu sebelum menghentikan dirinya sendiri.            | Tidak    | `"300"`     |

originContent: | `extra_nix_config`   | Extra Nix configuration to append to `/etc/nix/nix.conf`.                                       | No       | `""`        |
translatedContent: | `extra_nix_config`   | Konfigurasi Nix tambahan untuk ditambahkan ke `/etc/nix/nix.conf`.                             | Tidak    | `""`        |

originContent: Below is a complete workflow (`nix-build.yml`) that dynamically spins up multiple runner architectures (Ubuntu x86, Ubuntu ARM, macOS x86, macOS Apple Silicon), connects them together, and runs a distributed Nix build.
translatedContent: Di bawah ini adalah workflow lengkap (`nix-build.yml`) yang secara dinamis menjalankan beberapa arsitektur runner (Ubuntu x86, Ubuntu ARM, macOS x86, macOS Apple Silicon), menghubungkan mereka, dan menjalankan build Nix terdistribusi.

originContent: If you are building a heavy NixOS configuration and simply want to speed it up using horizontal scaling, you can change the `BUILDER_COUNTS` to spawn multiple identical x86 runners. For example:
translatedContent: Jika Anda membangun konfigurasi NixOS yang berat dan ingin mempercepatnya dengan penskalaan horizontal, Anda dapat mengubah `BUILDER_COUNTS` untuk membuat beberapa runner x86 yang identik. Contoh:

originContent: This will instantly give you a build farm with 16 CPU cores (4 runners × 4 cores) to process derivations in parallel.
translatedContent: Ini akan langsung memberi Anda build farm dengan 16 core CPU (4 runner × 4 core) untuk memproses derivasi secara paralel.

originContent: Since GitHub Hosted Runners are ephemeral, all build artifacts in the Nix store will be lost when the workflow finishes. To reap the benefits of your distributed builds in future CI runs or on your local machines, it is highly recommended to push the results to a binary cache like [Cachix](https://www.cachix.org) or [Attic](https://github.com/zhaofengli/attic).
translatedContent: Karena GitHub Hosted Runners bersifat sementara, semua artefak build di Nix store akan hilang saat workflow selesai. Untuk memanfaatkan hasil build terdistribusi Anda pada run CI berikutnya atau di mesin lokal, sangat disarankan untuk mengirim hasilnya ke binary cache seperti [Cachix](https://www.cachix.org) atau [Attic](https://github.com/zhaofengli/attic).
